namingTiers.global-dialog: Global game flag set across many maps, named by dialog only
namingTiers.setter-dialog: Named from ON-setter event dialog text
namingTiers.setter-dialog+map: Named from ON-setter dialog + map location context
namingTiers.setter+map: Named from ON-setter event + map from triggers/NPCs
namingTiers.npc-gated: Named from NPC gated by this switch
namingTiers.map-only: Location known from triggers/NPCs but no dialog
namingTiers.setter-only: Has setter event but no map or dialog context
namingTiers.clear-only: Only cleared (set OFF), never set ON in events
namingTiers.check-only: Checked by triggers/NPCs but never set in events
